command:
echo "=== 192.168.0.191 ==="

NH=$(grep -c "nohook resolv.conf" /etc/dhcpcd.conf 2>/dev/null)
GEN=$(grep -c "Generated by dhcpcd" /etc/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null)
DNS=$(getent hosts github.com >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo ok || echo FAIL)
echo "  nohook-lines=$NH  dhcpcd-header=$GEN  dns=$DNS"

echo "=== 192.168.0.192 ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.192 "bash -s" << 'VEOF'

NH=$(grep -c "nohook resolv.conf" /etc/dhcpcd.conf 2>/dev/null)
GEN=$(grep -c "Generated by dhcpcd" /etc/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null)
DNS=$(getent hosts github.com >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo ok || echo FAIL)
echo "  nohook-lines=$NH  dhcpcd-header=$GEN  dns=$DNS"

VEOF
